jobs.name: Post-Restart Resume
jobs.description: Immediately after the 4 AM restart, check MEMORY.md for active tasks and resume them
jobs.prompt: Gateway just restarted. Follow AGENTS.md § Task Persistence → On startup: read MEMORY.md Active Tasks, resume active ones, skip paused. Respect quiet hours. If you need a decision from Igor, follow AGENTS.md § Questions to the user (prefer y/n or multiple choice when practical). Run **browser close** once if the tool is available — clears orphan managed Chrome tabs from an interrupted prior session (AGENTS.md § Browser hygiene).

jobs.name: Morning Briefing
jobs.description: Daily morning summary of emails, tasks, and overnight events
jobs.prompt: Morning briefing: summarize unread emails (both Gmail and Yahoo), list today's calendar events, check for any overnight inbound phone calls (run vapi-call.py inbound-check), report any overnight errors, and include status of any active tasks from MEMORY.md. For tasks with **sms-watch**, note **last-sms-scan** / whether vendor replies may be pending. For Chrono24 task, mention **last-chrono-baseline** if present. Send via WhatsApp. If you used the browser for this briefing, run **browser close** before sending.

jobs.name: Email Triage
jobs.description: Periodic email inbox check and triage
jobs.prompt: Check email on both Gmail and Yahoo (see TOOLS.md § Email Access). Flag urgent messages, draft routine replies. Only notify user if something needs attention. If you need a decision from Igor, prefer y/n or A/B/C style options (AGENTS.md § Questions to the user). Also scan for senders/subjects tied to **active** tasks in workspace/MEMORY.md (e.g. Chrono24, Sub-Zero, appliance repair, Certified Refrigeration, Precision) and surface anything new that affects those tasks.

jobs.name: Chrono24 Listing Monitor
jobs.description: Check watch listing status when Chrono24 task is active in MEMORY
jobs.prompt:
Chrono24 listing monitor — see MEMORY.md Active Tasks.

1) Read workspace/MEMORY.md. If there is **no** active task involving Chrono24 / private seller listing / watchId 45455036, **stop** — no WhatsApp.

2) If there **is** an active Chrono24 task, read **last-chrono-baseline** (and listing URL from context). Check current listing state (managed browser is OK; use TOOLS.md guidance).

3) **WhatsApp Igor only if** one of: listing becomes **active/live**, buyer/offer/message needs action, or **material** status change vs baseline. If unchanged / still setting up, **do not** notify.

4) Update MEMORY on every run: **last-chrono-check** (ET time) and **last-chrono-baseline** (one-line state: inactive/active, notable flags).

5) **Browser hygiene (mandatory):** if you opened the browser for this job, run **`browser close`** before finishing — success, failure, or timeout (AGENTS.md § Browser hygiene).

6) **Quiet hours 11 PM–7 AM ET:** defer non-urgent alerts to the 7:30 AM briefing unless buyer action is urgent.

jobs.name: SMS / iMessage Reply Monitor
jobs.description: Poll Apple Messages threads that are under active watch for new vendor replies
jobs.prompt:
SMS/iMessage monitoring (see AGENTS.md § SMS reply monitoring + TOOLS.md § iMessage).

1) Read workspace/MEMORY.md → Active Tasks.
2) For each **active** task that has **sms-watch** (E.164 number or chat id) OR context that says you are waiting on an SMS/iMessage vendor reply, run:
   `python3 ~/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-igor.arsenin@gmail.com/My\ Drive/git/IgorOpenClaw/scripts/imessage.py read "<identifier>" --limit 30`
   Use the identifier from **sms-watch** or the vendor number in context.
3) Compare latest messages to **last-sms-baseline** in that task (timestamp + short summary you stored last time). If there is a **new inbound** from the vendor (not from Igor) since the baseline, send Igor a **concise WhatsApp** summary and suggest next steps (y/n or A/B/C if a decision is needed).
4) If nothing new, **do not** WhatsApp — only update MEMORY **last-sms-scan** (ET time) and refresh **last-sms-baseline** if needed.
5) **Quiet hours 11 PM–7 AM ET:** defer non-urgent SMS alerts to the 7:30 AM briefing unless the task context marks the thread as urgent.
6) If a task has no **sms-watch** but clearly awaits vendor SMS, add **sms-watch** + **last-sms-baseline** on this run for next time.
7) If **imessage.py** fails (e.g. Full Disk Access / permissions), add a one-line note under that task in MEMORY and **skip** WhatsApp this cycle unless the task is marked urgent; do not spam — next successful run can clear the note.

jobs.name: Inbound Call Check
jobs.description: Poll Vapi for new inbound phone calls and alert user
jobs.prompt: Run: python3 ~/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-igor.arsenin@gmail.com/My\ Drive/git/IgorOpenClaw/scripts/vapi-call.py inbound-check — If there are new inbound calls, send Igor a WhatsApp summary with: who called, when, and what they wanted (from the transcript). If no new calls, do nothing (no notification needed).

jobs.name: Daily API Spend Check
jobs.description: Fetch last-24h spend from paid APIs (OpenAI, Vapi) and WhatsApp a short summary to Igor
jobs.prompt:
Daily API spend check — send Igor a short WhatsApp summary of last-24h costs.

Load env vars by reading the first non-comment lines of ~/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-igor.arsenin@gmail.com/My\ Drive/git/IgorOpenClaw/.env to get OPENAI_ADMIN_KEY and VAPI_API_KEY. (Use python3 to parse the file.)

**1. OpenAI total cost (last 24h)**
```
import time, urllib.request, urllib.parse, json, os
start = int(time.time() - 86400)
end   = int(time.time())
url = f'https://api.openai.com/v1/organization/costs?start_time={start}&end_time={end}&limit=100'
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {OPENAI_ADMIN_KEY}'})
data = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(req).read())
total = sum(float((r.get('amount') or {}).get('value', 0)) for b in data.get('data',[]) for r in b.get('results',[]))
```
Also fetch per-model token counts:
```
url2 = f'https://api.openai.com/v1/organization/usage/completions?start_time={start}&end_time={end}&bucket_width=1d&group_by=model&limit=31'
```
Parse results[].model, input_tokens, output_tokens — group by model, sort descending by total tokens.

**2. Vapi cost (last 24h)**
```
url = 'https://api.vapi.ai/call?limit=100'
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {VAPI_API_KEY}'})
calls = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(req).read())
```
Filter calls where startedAt >= 24h ago (ISO timestamp). Sum `cost` field. Count calls.

**3. Compose WhatsApp message** (3–6 lines max, no markdown, plain text):
```
💰 API Spend — last 24h
OpenAI: $X.XX  (ModelA Xk in / Xk out, ModelB ...)
Vapi:   $X.XX  (N calls)
Gemini / HF / AlphaVantage: flat/free — no usage API
Total: $X.XX
```
Round all dollar amounts to 2 decimal places. If a fetch fails, note 'fetch error' for that line and continue — do not skip the whole report.

**4. Send** that message via WhatsApp to Igor.

**No browser is used in this job.**

jobs.name: System Health
jobs.description: Periodic system and gateway health check
jobs.prompt: Run a system health check: verify gateway status, check disk space, review recent error logs. Only notify me if something is wrong. If recent gateway logs show browser timeouts/errors, run **browser close** once if available to clear stuck managed Chrome (TOOLS.md § Browser Rules).
